hero.title: Clinical Insights Through Playful Experiences.
hero.description: Teko transforms clinical assessments into games children love, delivering ready-to-use data to psychologists before the first session.

modules.title: A Tri-Fold Ecosystem
modules.subtitle: Bridging the gap between clinical rigor, child engagement, and parental peace of mind.

child.title: The Playful Interface (Children)
child.description: Explain how children 5-12 engage in games that are actually clinical assessments. No clinical stress, just play—capturing raw, authentic data.

psychologist.title: Behavioral Maps (Psychologists)
psychologist.description: Ready data before the first session. Highlight structured behavioral maps and professional dashboards for immediate diagnostic clarity.

parent.title: Family Connection (Parents)
parent.description: Showcase clear visibility into progress without the clinical jargon. Reassuring and easy to understand reports that bring families together.

psychologist.title: Save hours on intake with pre-session data.
psychologist.description: Enter your first session with a detailed behavioral roadmap. Our automated pre-assessment identifies key markers while the child plays, letting you focus on the human connection.

clinic.title: Gain a competitive edge with cutting-edge PsychTech.
clinic.description: Streamline workflows and increase patient satisfaction through technology that respects clinical boundaries.

parent.title: Finally see the progress your child is making.
parent.description: We bridge the gap between complex clinical data and understandable family updates. No jargon, just clarity.

cta_bottom.title: Ready to redefine the pediatric clinical experience?
cta_bottom.description: Join hundreds of clinics transforming their intake process and deepening patient relationships.
cta_bottom.note: No credit card required for 14-day trial.
